# pendragonx.com

> PendragonX is the AI-powered second brain that auto-connects every idea in a living 3D knowledge graph, lets you chat with your own notes, build agents, and visualize with Canvas/Mind Maps. Import from Notion or Obsidian instantly. End-to-end encrypted. The smarter alternative to Notion, Obsidian, and OneNote.

## Topics
- AI second brain
- 3D knowledge graph
- Zettelkasten
- Personal knowledge management (PKM)
- Notion / Obsidian / Roam alternative
- AI agents for notes
- Canvas, Whiteboard, Mind Map studios
- End-to-end encryption
- Chrome extension
- Real-time collaboration

## Key questions answered
- What is an AI second brain?
- How is PendragonX different from Notion or Obsidian?
- Can I import my Notion / Obsidian / Roam notes?
- Is my data private and encrypted?
- How do AI agents work inside PendragonX?
